models.EstimationRequest: A parsed PRD that serves as the input to the estimation pipeline. Contains the raw document content, AI-extracted structure (overview, features, constraints, ambiguities, implicit requirements), and a status tracking its lifecycle from draft through confirmation to estimation.
models.RequestFeature: A discrete feature extracted from a PRD during ingestion. Belongs to an EstimationRequest and carries a name and description that feed into the estimation step.

estimationRequests.title: Mobile Banking App
estimationRequests.rawContent:
# Mobile Banking App PRD

## Overview
A consumer-facing mobile banking application that enables users to manage accounts, transfer funds, pay bills, and deposit checks via camera capture. The app targets iOS and Android with a shared React Native codebase...
estimationRequests.projectOverview: A consumer-facing mobile banking application enabling account management, fund transfers, bill payments, and mobile check deposits. Targets iOS and Android via React Native with a Node.js backend. Must comply with PCI DSS and SOC 2 requirements. Initial release scoped to US market with English language support.
technicalConstraints: React Native for cross-platform mobile (iOS + Android)
Node.js backend with PostgreSQL
PCI DSS compliance required for payment processing
SOC 2 Type II certification required
Must integrate with Plaid for bank account linking
Biometric authentication (Face ID / fingerprint) required
ambiguities: No mention of offline mode — should the app function without connectivity?
Bill pay frequency unclear — one-time only or recurring scheduled payments?
Check deposit limits not specified — what are the daily and monthly caps?
Push notification strategy not detailed — what events trigger notifications?
No accessibility requirements stated — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance expected?
implicitRequirements: Session timeout and automatic logout for security compliance
Transaction history with search and filtering
Account balance caching for fast load times
Error handling for failed transfers with retry mechanism
Rate limiting on sensitive endpoints (login, transfers)

features.name: Account Dashboard
features.description: Overview screen showing all linked accounts with real-time balances, recent transactions, and quick-action shortcuts for common operations.

features.name: Fund Transfers
features.description: Transfer money between own accounts or to external accounts via ACH. Includes transfer scheduling, amount validation, and confirmation flow with receipt.

features.name: Bill Payment
features.description: Search and add billers, enter payment amounts, select payment dates. Support for one-time payments with payee management.

features.name: Mobile Check Deposit
features.description: Capture front and back of check using device camera. Image quality validation, amount entry, and deposit confirmation with hold period display.

features.name: Authentication & Security
features.description: Login with email/password plus biometric unlock. Multi-factor authentication for sensitive operations. Session management and device trust.

features.name: Plaid Account Linking
features.description: Integrate Plaid Link SDK for connecting external bank accounts. Handle OAuth flows, account verification, and connection status management.

features.name: Transaction History
features.description: Paginated list of all transactions across accounts with search, date range filtering, category tags, and export to CSV.

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Real-time alerts for incoming deposits, completed transfers, low balance warnings, and security events. User-configurable notification preferences.

estimationRequests.title: Analytics Dashboard
estimationRequests.rawContent:
## Analytics Dashboard

We need a dashboard for our internal teams to visualize key business metrics...
estimationRequests.projectOverview: An internal analytics dashboard for visualizing business metrics across sales, marketing, and product usage. Displays KPIs, time-series charts, and filterable data tables. Built as a web application with role-based access control.
technicalConstraints: Next.js frontend with server-side rendering
PostgreSQL data warehouse via read replicas
Must support datasets up to 10M rows with sub-second query times
Role-based access: admin, analyst, viewer
ambiguities: Data refresh frequency not specified — real-time, hourly, or daily?
Export formats unclear — PDF, CSV, both?
No mention of alerting — should users receive threshold-based alerts?
implicitRequirements: Dashboard state persistence (saved filters, date ranges)
Responsive layout for tablet use in meetings

features.name: KPI Cards
features.description: Top-level metric cards showing current values, period-over-period change, and sparkline trend indicators for key business metrics.

features.name: Time-Series Charts
features.description: Interactive line and area charts with configurable date ranges, comparison periods, and drill-down capabilities.

features.name: Data Tables
features.description: Sortable, filterable tables with pagination for detailed record inspection. Column visibility controls and inline search.

features.name: Saved Views
features.description: Persist filter configurations, date ranges, and chart selections as named views. Share views with team members via URL.

estimationRequests.title: E-commerce Platform Rebuild
estimationRequests.rawContent: The attached document describes our platform rebuild requirements...
estimationRequests.projectOverview: Full rebuild of an existing e-commerce platform from a monolithic PHP application to a headless architecture. New storefront in Next.js, order management backend in Node.js, and migration of 50K+ existing products and 200K+ customer records.
technicalConstraints: Headless commerce architecture (Medusa.js or custom)
Next.js storefront with ISR for product pages
Must support 500 concurrent users during peak sales
Stripe for payments, Shippo for shipping rates
Data migration from legacy MySQL to PostgreSQL
Existing product image CDN must be preserved
ambiguities: Multi-currency support mentioned but no target currencies listed
Loyalty program referenced but no point system rules defined
Inventory sync frequency with warehouse system not specified
Return/refund policy rules not documented for automated processing
SEO requirements vague — need clarity on redirect mapping from old URLs
implicitRequirements: Cart persistence across sessions and devices
Order status webhooks for third-party integrations
Admin audit log for inventory and price changes
GDPR compliance for EU customer data

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Browsable product catalog with category navigation, faceted search, and product detail pages with image galleries, variants, and pricing.

features.name: Shopping Cart & Checkout
features.description: Persistent cart with quantity management, discount code application, multi-step checkout with address, shipping method, and payment selection.

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Admin interface for viewing, processing, and fulfilling orders. Status tracking, shipping label generation, and refund processing.

features.name: Customer Accounts
features.description: Registration, login, profile management, order history, saved addresses, and wishlist. Password reset and email verification flows.

features.name: Search & Discovery
features.description: Full-text product search with typo tolerance, filters (price, category, brand, rating), and merchandising rules for featured results.

features.name: Data Migration
features.description: ETL pipeline to migrate 50K products and 200K customers from legacy MySQL. Includes data validation, transformation rules, and rollback capability.

estimationRequests.title: Internal CRM Tool
estimationRequests.rawContent: We need a lightweight CRM for our sales team to track leads and deals...
estimationRequests.projectOverview: A lightweight internal CRM for the sales team to track leads, manage deal pipelines, and log client communications. Replaces a fragmented spreadsheet-based workflow with a structured tool integrated with email and calendar.
technicalConstraints: Web application — no mobile app required
Google Workspace integration (Gmail, Calendar)
Must import existing data from Google Sheets (~2K contacts)
ambiguities: Reporting depth unclear — basic pipeline metrics or full sales analytics?
No mention of team territories or lead assignment rules
implicitRequirements: Activity logging for calls, emails, and meetings
Deal stage automation (move to next stage on trigger)

features.name: Contact Management
features.description: Create, view, and edit contacts with company association. Import from CSV/Google Sheets. Search and filter by company, status, or tag.

features.name: Deal Pipeline
features.description: Kanban-style pipeline view with configurable stages. Drag-and-drop deal progression, deal value tracking, and expected close dates.

features.name: Activity Timeline
features.description: Chronological log of all interactions with a contact or deal — emails, calls, meetings, notes. Auto-populated from Gmail and Calendar integration.

features.name: Google Workspace Integration
features.description: Two-way sync with Gmail for email logging and Google Calendar for meeting tracking. OAuth-based connection with per-user configuration.

estimationRequests.title: API Gateway Service
estimationRequests.projectOverview: A centralized API gateway to route, authenticate, and rate-limit requests across internal microservices. Consolidates authentication, logging, and traffic management into a single entry point.
technicalConstraints: Must handle 10K requests/second at p99 < 50ms
JWT-based authentication with JWKS rotation
Kubernetes deployment with horizontal pod autoscaling
ambiguities: No mention of request/response transformation rules
implicitRequirements: Health check endpoints for upstream services
Circuit breaker pattern for failing backends

features.name: Request Routing
features.description: Path-based routing to downstream services with configurable route tables, header forwarding rules, and timeout settings.

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: Per-client and per-endpoint rate limiting with configurable windows, burst allowances, and 429 response handling.

features.name: Authentication Gateway
features.description: JWT validation, token introspection, and JWKS key rotation. Passes verified claims to downstream services via headers.
